Note:
Haz clic en la imagen de un personaje para seleccionarlo y organizar tu zona de juego.

Cuando todos los jugadores hayan elegido 
un Personaje, haz clic en el botón situado debajo de los Brujos para eliminar
 la selección de Personajes.

end

ObjectStates.Description: Click on the handle to close.
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
local ConcealedStorageHeight = 3.0
local ConceiledStorageOffset = 10000.0
local StorageState = 1
local ObjectLockStates = {}

local BB = {
	Min = {
		x = -16.0,
		y = 41.99,
		z = -50.0
	},
	Max = {
		x = 16.0,
		y = 41.99,
		z = -32.0
	}
}

function onSave()
    local saveObj = {};
	
    for k,v in pairs( ObjectLockStates ) do
        if v ~= nil then
			saveObj[k] = v;
        end
    end
	
    return JSON.encode( saveObj );
end

function onLoad( saveData )
    self.interactable = false;
	
	if saveData ~= "" then
		ObjectLockStates = JSON.decode( saveData ) or {};
	end
	
    self.createButton({
		label = "",
		click_function = "onButtonClick",
		function_owner = self,
		width = 1000,
		height = 750,
		color = {1, 0, 0, 0.0},
		position = {0, 40.7, 50.5},
		rotation = {-90, 0, 0},
		font_size = 200
    })
	
	if self.getStateId() ~= StorageState then
		Timer.create({
			identifier = ("onAfterLoad" .. self.guid),
			function_name = "onAfterLoad",
			delay = 0.2
		})
	end
end

function onAfterLoad()
	local pos = self.getPosition()
	local bounds = self.getBoundsNormalized()
	local rot = self.getRotation()
	local direction = 1.0
	
	if rot.y == 0 then
		direction = -1.0
	end
	
	BB.Min.x = BB.Min.x + pos.x
	BB.Min.y = BB.Min.y + pos.y - 1.5
	BB.Min.z = (BB.Min.z * direction) + pos.z
	
	BB.Max.x = 	BB.Max.x + pos.x
	BB.Max.y = 	BB.Max.y + pos.y + ConcealedStorageHeight + 0.5
	BB.Max.z = (BB.Max.z * direction) + pos.z
	
	HideObjectsAbove( false )
end

function onButtonClick()
	local currentState = self.getStateId()
	local nextState = 1 + (currentState % 2)
	
	if currentState ~= StorageState then
		HideObjectsAbove( true )
	end
	
	self.script_state = onSave()
	self.setState( nextState )
end

function HideObjectsAbove( toggle )
    local objectsAbove = {}
	local BBMin = { x = BB.Min.x, y = BB.Min.y, z = BB.Min.z }
	local BBMax = { x = BB.Max.x, y = BB.Max.y, z = BB.Max.z }
	
	if not toggle then
		BBMin.y = BBMin.y - ConceiledStorageOffset
		BBMax.y = BBMax.y - ConceiledStorageOffset
	end
    
    for k,v in pairs( getAllObjects() ) do
        if v != self then
            if PointToAABBIntersect( BBMin, BBMax, v.getPosition() ) then
                if toggle then
                    Store( v )
                else
                    Dispense( v )
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

-- Assumes ||min|| < ||max||
function PointToAABBIntersect( min, max, point )
    if IsInRange( point.x, min.x, max.x ) and
       IsInRange( point.y, min.y, max.y ) and
       IsInRange( point.z, min.z, max.z ) then
	   return true
    end
    
    return false
end

function IsInRange( value, a, b )
	local min = 0
	local max = 0
	
	if a > b then
		max = a
		min = b
	else
		max = b
		min = a
	end
	
	if value > min and value < max then
		return true
	end
	
	return false
end

function Store( obj )
	local pos = obj.getPosition()
	local isLocked = obj.getLock()
	
	ObjectLockStates[obj.getGUID()] = isLocked;
	
    obj.interactable = false
    obj.setLock( true )
    obj.setPosition({
        x = pos.x,
        y = pos.y - ConceiledStorageOffset,
        z = pos.z
    })
end

function Dispense( obj )
	local pos = obj.getPosition()
	local originalLockStatus = ObjectLockStates[obj.getGUID()] or false
	
	ObjectLockStates[obj.getGUID()] = nil
	
    obj.setPosition({
        x = pos.x,
        y = pos.y + ConceiledStorageOffset,
        z = pos.z
    })
	
    obj.interactable = true
	obj.setLock( originalLockStatus or false )
end

-- Ludo Lodge Custom Counter Tokens by Ryan Langewisch
-- Based on the excellent Universal Counter Tokens by MrStump

-- Adjust the following values to customize the counter's appearance
-- Every value named in ALL_CAPS is a value you can modify

-- Minimum and maximum values for this counter
MINIMUM_VALUE = 0 -- Use something like -9999 to allow negatives
MAXIMUM_VALUE = 999

-- If true: allows you to type a number in the token's description, and then
--click the value button to set it directly to that number
--
-- Set to false to disable
ALLOW_SET_FROM_DESCRIPTION = false

-- Button colors (RGB values from 0.0 to 1.0)
-- For a RGB color that has values 0-255, simply divide by 255
BUTTON_BACKGROUND_COLOR = {0.72, 0.65, 0.55}
VALUE_FONT_COLOR = {0.84, 0.82, 0.72}
BUTTON_FONT_COLOR = {0, 0, 0}

-- Value button parameters (this is what shows the current count)
VALUE_BUTTON_HEIGHT = 0
VALUE_BUTTON_WIDTH = 0
VALUE_BUTTON_HORIZONTAL_POSITION = 0 -- Negative for left, positive for right
VALUE_BUTTON_VERTICAL_POSITION = 0   -- Negative for up, positive for down
ONE_DIGIT_VERT_POS = 0.06
TWO_DIGIT_VERT_POS = 0.0
THREE_DIGIT_VERT_POS = -0.05
FOUR_DIGIT_VERT_POS = -0.3
ONE_DIGIT_FONT_SIZE = 600
TWO_DIGIT_FONT_SIZE = 500
THREE_DIGIT_FONT_SIZE = 350
FOUR_DIGIT_FONT_SIZE = 200

-- +1 button parameters (button to add 1 to the count)
PLUS_ONE_BUTTON_HEIGHT = 300
PLUS_ONE_BUTTON_WIDTH = 300
PLUS_ONE_BUTTON_HORIZONTAL_POSITION = 0.35   -- Negative for left, positive for right
PLUS_ONE_BUTTON_VERTICAL_POSITION = 1.35   -- Negative for up, positive for down
PLUS_ONE_BUTTON_FONT_SIZE = 200
PLUS_ONE_BUTTON_LABEL = '+1'

-- -1 button parameters (button to subtract 1 from the count)
MINUS_ONE_BUTTON_HEIGHT = 300
MINUS_ONE_BUTTON_WIDTH = 300
MINUS_ONE_BUTTON_HORIZONTAL_POSITION = -0.35   -- Negative for left, positive for right
MINUS_ONE_BUTTON_VERTICAL_POSITION = 1.35-- Negative for up, positive for down
MINUS_ONE_BUTTON_FONT_SIZE = 200
MINUS_ONE_BUTTON_LABEL = '-1'

-- +5 button parameters (button to add 5 to the count)
SHOW_PLUS_FIVE_BUTTON = true   -- Set to false for no +5 button
PLUS_FIVE_BUTTON_HEIGHT = 300
PLUS_FIVE_BUTTON_WIDTH = 300
PLUS_FIVE_BUTTON_HORIZONTAL_POSITION = 0.95   -- Negative for left, positive for right
PLUS_FIVE_BUTTON_VERTICAL_POSITION = 1.35   -- Negative for up, positive for down
PLUS_FIVE_BUTTON_FONT_SIZE = 200
PLUS_FIVE_BUTTON_LABEL = '+5'

-- -5 button parameters (button to subtract 5 from the count)
SHOW_MINUS_FIVE_BUTTON = true   -- Set to false for no -5 button
MINUS_FIVE_BUTTON_HEIGHT = 300
MINUS_FIVE_BUTTON_WIDTH = 300
MINUS_FIVE_BUTTON_HORIZONTAL_POSITION = -0.95   -- Negative for left, positive for right
MINUS_FIVE_BUTTON_VERTICAL_POSITION = 1.35-- Negative for up, positive for down
MINUS_FIVE_BUTTON_FONT_SIZE = 200
MINUS_FIVE_BUTTON_LABEL = '-5'

--------------------------------------------
-- CHANGE CODE BELOW AT YOUR OWN RISK. :) --
--------------------------------------------

-- Load save data and create buttons
function onLoad(saved_data)
-- Load saved count value if save data is found
if saved_data != '' then
  local loaded_data = JSON.decode(saved_data)
  count = math.max(math.min(loaded_data.saved_count, MAXIMUM_VALUE), MINIMUM_VALUE)
else

  count = MINIMUM_VALUE
end

generateButtonParameters()
createButtons()


end

-- Save count to save data
function onSave()
local data_to_save = {saved_count = count}
saved_data = JSON.encode(data_to_save)
return saved_data
end

function setHP(val)
count = tonumber(val)
updateValue()
end

-- Add 1 to the count and update the value button
function add_one()
count = math.min(count + 1, MAXIMUM_VALUE)
updateValue()
end

-- Subtract 1 from the count and update the value button
function subtract_one()

count = math.max(count - 1, MINIMUM_VALUE)
updateValue()

end

-- Add 5 to the count and update the value button
function add_five()
count = math.min(count + 5, MAXIMUM_VALUE)
updateValue()
end

-- Subtract 5 from the count and update the value button
function subtract_five()

count = math.max(count - 5, MINIMUM_VALUE)

updateValue()
end

-- Check if the description is a number, and set the count to that number
function setCountFromDescription()
if ALLOW_SET_FROM_DESCRIPTION then
  local description = self.getDescription()
  if description != '' and type(tonumber(description)) == 'number' then
self.setDescription('')
count = tonumber(description)
updateValue()
  end
end
end

-- Update the value button according to the current count
function updateValue()

value_button_parameters.font_size = getValueButtonFontSize()
value_button_parameters.position = {VALUE_BUTTON_HORIZONTAL_POSITION, 0.1, getValuePos()}

value_button_parameters.label = tostring(count)
self.editButton(value_button_parameters)
end

-- Return a font size based on the number of digits in the current count
function getValueButtonFontSize()
if count >= 0 and count <= 9 then
  return ONE_DIGIT_FONT_SIZE
elseif count >= 10 and count <= 99 then
  return TWO_DIGIT_FONT_SIZE
elseif count >= 100 and count <= 999 then
  return THREE_DIGIT_FONT_SIZE
elseif count <= -1 and count >= -9 then
  return TWO_DIGIT_FONT_SIZE
elseif count <= -10 and count >= -99 then
  return THREE_DIGIT_FONT_SIZE
else
  return FOUR_DIGIT_FONT_SIZE
end
end

function getValuePos()
if count >= 0 and count <= 9 then
  return ONE_DIGIT_VERT_POS
elseif count >= 10 and count <= 99 then
  return TWO_DIGIT_VERT_POS
elseif count >= 100 and count <= 999 then
  return THREE_DIGIT_VERT_POS
elseif count <= -1 and count >= -9 then
  return TWO_DIGIT_VERT_POS
elseif count <= -10 and count >= -99 then
  return THREE_DIGIT_VERT_POS
else
  return FOUR_DIGIT_VERT_POS
end
end

-- Create buttons based on the button parameters
function createButtons()
value_button_parameters.label = tostring(count)
value_button_parameters.font_size = getValueButtonFontSize()
value_button_parameters.position = {VALUE_BUTTON_HORIZONTAL_POSITION, 0.1, getValuePos()}

self.createButton(value_button_parameters)
self.createButton(plus_one_button_parameters)
self.createButton(minus_one_button_parameters)

if SHOW_PLUS_FIVE_BUTTON then
  self.createButton(plus_five_button_parameters)
end

if SHOW_MINUS_FIVE_BUTTON then
  self.createButton(minus_five_button_parameters)
end
end

-- Load button parameters into tables for button creation
function generateButtonParameters()
value_button_parameters = {
  index = 0, click_function = 'setCountFromDescription', function_owner = self, label = '',
  position = {VALUE_BUTTON_HORIZONTAL_POSITION, 0.1, getValuePos()},
  width = VALUE_BUTTON_WIDTH, height = VALUE_BUTTON_HEIGHT,
  color = BUTTON_BACKGROUND_COLOR, font_color = VALUE_FONT_COLOR,
  font_size = getValueButtonFontSize()
}

  width = PLUS_ONE_BUTTON_WIDTH, height = PLUS_ONE_BUTTON_HEIGHT,
  color = BUTTON_BACKGROUND_COLOR, font_color = BUTTON_FONT_COLOR,
  font_size = PLUS_ONE_BUTTON_FONT_SIZE

ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
claimedBy = nil
ALL_PLAYERS = {"Red", "Green", "Blue", "Orange", "Purple"}

function setItem(obj)
  if obj.hasTag("Lock") then 
    obj.setLock(true)
  end
  obj.setGMNotes("") 
  if Global.getVar("uniqueActions") then
    if obj.hasTag("Unique") then
      obj.setPositionSmooth(obj.getPosition() + Vector(-2.12,1.5,0))
    end
  end
  if not Global.getVar("uniqueActions") then
    if obj.hasTag("Unique") then
      obj.destroy()
    end
  end
  if obj.hasTag("StartingDeck") then
    Wait.time(function() obj.shuffle() end,1.5)
  end
  if obj.hasTag("ScoringToken") then
    obj.setPositionSmooth({5.24, 2, 1.36})
  end
  if obj.hasTag("Trophies") then
    local players = Global.getVar("numPlayers")
    for i = players, 4 do
      local card = obj.takeObject({
        smooth = false,
        position = {59.09, 1.71, 18.79}
      })
      card.destroy()
    end
  end
end 

function selectCharacter(newItem, playerColor)
  local handTransform = Player[playerColor].getHandTransform(1)
  local handRot = handTransform.rotation
  handRot.y = handRot.y - 180 -- Rotate by 180 degrees
  local handPos = handTransform.position

  -- Destroy objects with matching color tags before adding new objects
  for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
    if obj.hasTag(playerColor) then
      obj.destroy()
    end
  end

  for _, x in pairs(newItem.getObjects()) do 
    local posLog = x.gm_notes
    if not posLog then
      print("Error: Object '" .. x.guid .. "' has no gm_notes")
      return
    end
    local splitPos = Global.call("split", {posLog, ":"}) 
    if #splitPos < 6 then
      print("Error: Object '" .. x.guid .. "' has invalid gm_notes")
      return
    end
    local pos = handPos + Vector(tonumber(splitPos[1]), tonumber(splitPos[2]), tonumber(splitPos[3]))
    local rot = handRot + Vector(tonumber(splitPos[4]), tonumber(splitPos[5]), tonumber(splitPos[6]))

    local obj = newItem.takeObject({
      guid = x.guid,
      smooth = false,
      position = pos,
      rotation = rot,
      callback_function = function(obj) setItem(obj) end
    })
    obj.addTag(playerColor)
  end
  
  newItem.destruct()
end

function OnLoadClick(player, value, id)
  local playerColor = player.color
  if not contains(ALL_PLAYERS, playerColor) then
    broadcastToColor("Error: Only Red, Green, Blue, Orange or Purple can use this button.", playerColor, {1,0,0})
    return
  end
  self.takeObject({
    smooth = false,
    position = {52,115,-30},
    callback_function = function(items) PlaceMe(items, playerColor) end
  }) 
end

function PlaceMe(items, playerColor)
  local newItem = items
  local myEndN = function() selectCharacter(newItem, playerColor) end
  Wait.time(myEndN, 1)
end

function contains(list, x)
  for _,v in pairs(list) do
    if v == x then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

		})
	end

	local bounds = self.getBoundsNormalized()
	local rot = self.getRotation()
	local direction = 1.0

	end

	BB.Max.z = (BB.Max.z * direction) + pos.z

ObjectStates.LuaScript:
claimedBy = nil
ALL_PLAYERS = {"Red", "Green", "Blue", "Orange", "Purple"}

function setItem(obj)
  if obj.hasTag("Lock") then
    obj.setLock(true)
  end
  obj.setGMNotes("")
  if Global.getVar("uniqueActions") then
    if obj.hasTag("Unique") then
      obj.setPositionSmooth(obj.getPosition() + Vector(-2.12,1.5,0))
    end
  end
  if not Global.getVar("uniqueActions") then
    if obj.hasTag("Unique") then
      obj.destroy()
    end
  end
  if obj.hasTag("StartingDeck") then
    Wait.time(function() obj.shuffle() end,1.5)
  end
  if obj.hasTag("ScoringToken") then
    obj.setPositionSmooth({5.24, 2, 1.36})
  end
  if obj.hasTag("Trophies") then
    local players = Global.getVar("numPlayers")
    for i = players, 4 do
      local card = obj.takeObject({
        smooth = false,
        position = {59.09, 1.71, 18.79}
      })
      card.destroy()
    end
  end
end

function selectCharacter(newItem, playerColor)
  local handTransform = Player[playerColor].getHandTransform(1)
  local handRot = handTransform.rotation
  handRot.y = handRot.y - 180 -- Rotate by 180 degrees
  local handPos = handTransform.position

  -- Destroy objects with matching color tags before adding new objects
  for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
    if obj.hasTag(playerColor) then
      obj.destroy()
    end
  end

  for _, x in pairs(newItem.getObjects()) do
    local posLog = x.gm_notes
    if not posLog then
      print("Error: Object '" .. x.guid .. "' has no gm_notes")
      return
    end
    local splitPos = Global.call("split", {posLog, ":"})
    if #splitPos < 6 then
      print("Error: Object '" .. x.guid .. "' has invalid gm_notes")
      return
    end
    local pos = handPos + Vector(tonumber(splitPos[1]), tonumber(splitPos[2]), tonumber(splitPos[3]))
    local rot = handRot + Vector(tonumber(splitPos[4]), tonumber(splitPos[5]), tonumber(splitPos[6]))

    local obj = newItem.takeObject({
      guid = x.guid,
      smooth = false,
      position = pos,
      rotation = rot,
      callback_function = function(obj) setItem(obj) end
    })
    obj.addTag(playerColor)
  end

  newItem.destruct()
end

function OnLoadClick(player, value, id)
  local playerColor = player.color
  if not contains(ALL_PLAYERS, playerColor) then
    broadcastToColor("Error: Solo Rojo, Verde, Azul, Naranja o Morado pueden usar este botón.", playerColor, {1,0,0})
    return
  end
  self.takeObject({
    smooth = false,
    position = {52,115,-30},
    callback_function = function(items) PlaceMe(items, playerColor) end
  })
end

function PlaceMe(items, playerColor)
  local newItem = items
  local myEndN = function() selectCharacter(newItem, playerColor) end
  Wait.time(myEndN, 1)
end

function contains(list, x)
  for _,v in pairs(list) do
    if v == x then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

ObjectStates.LuaScript:
claimedBy = nil

function OnLoadClick(player, value, id)
	local y = 2
	for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
		if obj.hasTag("CharSelectCard") then
			obj.destroy()
		end
		if obj.hasTag("CharSelect") then
			obj.setLock(false)
			if obj.hasTag("Core") then
				obj.setPosition({54.06, y, -25.68})
			end
			if obj.hasTag("Mages") then
				obj.setPosition({-54.56, y, -25.68})
			end
			y = y + 0.5
		end
	end
end
